criteria.name: AI-Powered Content Generation
criteria.description: The app's ability to automatically generate engaging and relevant content, including captions, posts, and images, using AI algorithms.

criteria.name: AI-Driven Social Listening
criteria.description: The app's capacity to use AI (ML and NLP) to analyze data from social media platforms, forums, and review websites to understand brand awareness, customer insights, and trending topics.

criteria.name: AI-Enhanced Scheduling and Automation
criteria.description: The app's capability to automate scheduling and publishing tasks, optimize posting times, and provide AI-driven recommendations for maximizing engagement.

criteria.name: Sentiment Analysis and Brand Monitoring
criteria.description: The app's ability to track audience sentiment and maintain brand reputation through sentiment analysis features.

criteria.name: Personalization and Targeting
criteria.description: The app's capacity to analyze audience data and tailor content and ads for specific user segments to improve engagement and post relevancy.

criteria.name: Competitive Analysis
criteria.description: The app's functionalities for monitoring competitor performance, identifying industry trends, and benchmarking against peers.
